heading: Description of grant program
label: 10332 Description of grant program
text: The Director is authorized to make grants to provide equipment and personnel training for the closed-circuit televising and video taping of the testimony of children in criminal proceedings for the violation of laws relating to the abuse of children.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796aa–1 of Title 42
Amendments1994— struck out “to States, for the use of States and units of local government in the States” after “make grants”.Pub. L. 103–322
